scenario.title: The Report Generator
scenario.context: You need AI to generate a weekly team status report. The report will be automatically processed by your project management system, which expects specific sections in a specific order with specific metadata.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that produces a multi-section document with exact section headers, required metadata, and conditional content based on data availability.
constraints: Define exact section headers and order
Specify required metadata for each section
Include conditional rules (if X then include Y)
Define fallback content for missing data
scenario.exampleInput: Team: Engineering. Week: Jan 8-12. Data: 3 completed items, 2 blocked items, 1 team member on PTO. Needs to integrate with Notion.
hints: What sections are always required? Which are conditional?
What metadata (dates, counts, etc.) should appear where?
What should appear if there are no blocked items?

rubric.name: Section Structure
rubric.description: Are sections clearly defined with exact headers?

scoringGuide.excellent: All sections listed with exact header text and order
scoringGuide.good: Sections defined but headers not exact

scoringGuide.excellent: All metadata fields defined with format and placement
Clear if/then rules for conditional sections

rubric.name: Fallback Handling
rubric.description: Are fallbacks for missing data defined?

scoringGuide.excellent: Specific fallback content for each potential gap

evaluatorContext.idealResponse:
Generate a weekly status report using this exact structure for Notion integration:

```
# Weekly Status: [Team Name]
**Period:** [Start Date] - [End Date]
**Author:** Auto-generated
**Status:** [GOOD/CAUTION/BLOCKED]

## Summary
[2-3 sentence executive summary]
Metrics: [X] completed | [Y] in progress | [Z] blocked

## Completed This Week
[List each item as: - [ITEM-ID] Item description]
IF no items: "No items completed this week."

## In Progress
[List each item as: - [ITEM-ID] Item description (X% complete)]
IF no items: "No items currently in progress."

## Blocked Items
[List each item as: - [ITEM-ID] Item description | Blocker: [reason] | Owner: [name]]
IF no blocked items: OMIT THIS SECTION ENTIRELY

## Team Notes
IF PTO: "Team capacity: [X]/[Y] members (PTO: [names])"
IF no PTO: "Team at full capacity."

## Next Week Focus
[Bullet list of 2-3 priorities]
```

Data for this report:
- Team: Engineering
- Week: Jan 8-12, 2024
- Completed: 3 items
- In progress: 4 items
- Blocked: 2 items
- PTO: Sarah (Mon-Wed)

Rules:
- Overall Status = BLOCKED if any blocked items exist, CAUTION if >50% items in progress, else GOOD
- Use placeholder [ITEM-ID] format: ENG-XXX
- All sections required except Blocked Items (conditional)
- Dates in format: Mon DD, YYYY
